name: yaver
description: Use the Yaver MCP server from Codex to drive your own dev machine and paired phone.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to your local Yaver dev machine.
interface.longDescription: Yaver runs as a local MCP server so Codex can pair your phone, start development loops, hot-reload React Native bundles, inspect feedback, and manage self-hosted app projects without sending source code through a hosted middleman.
defaultPrompt: Set up Yaver for this repo.
